The latest update is out from Kidsland International Holdings Limited ( (HK:2122) ).

Kidsland International Holdings Limited has entered into a strategic partnership with Jazwares, a Berkshire Hathaway toy company, to launch the ‘HELLO KITTY AND FRIENDS’ toy line in mainland China. This collaboration aims to enhance Kidsland’s IP ecosystem and expand its presence in the all-age market by offering diverse and trendy toy options. The partnership is expected to strengthen Kidsland’s market position by enriching its portfolio with innovative products and providing Chinese consumers with a wider range of international toy brands.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2122) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kidsland International Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:2122 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kidsland International Holdings Limited

Kidsland International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the toy industry. It focuses on the distribution and promotion of international toy brands and intellectual properties (IPs) in the China market, leveraging over 20 years of experience in toy operations and channel networks.

An update from Smoore International Holdings Limited ( (HK:6969) ) is now available.

Smoore International Holdings Limited has announced the renewal of its Procurement Framework Agreement with EVE Energy, effective from January 1, 2026, to December 31, 2028. This renewal is expected to support Smoore’s operations and strengthen its position in the evolving global atomization and vaping markets.

data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

The latest announcement is out from Gold Peak Technology Group Limited ( (HK:0040) ).

Gold Peak Technology Group Limited announced its unaudited interim results for the six months ending September 30, 2025, showing a slight revenue increase of 0.5% to HK$3,554.0 million despite global economic challenges. The company’s gross profit margin declined due to U.S. tariffs and increased competition, but profit attributable to owners rose by 38.6% to HK$36.2 million. The Group’s strategic cost control measures and sales channel expansion in key markets contributed to the improved financial performance, with notable growth in the electronics and acoustics segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0040) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gold Peak Technology Group Limited stock, see the HK:0040 Stock Forecast page.

Gold Peak Technology Group Limited operates in the technology sector, focusing on battery production, electronics, and acoustics. The company offers a range of products including primary and rechargeable batteries and has a significant market presence in Asia, Europe, and the Americas.

data.title: 3DG Holdings Issues Profit Warning Amid Gold Price Surge
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Hong Kong Resources Holdings Co. Ltd. ( (HK:2882) ) has provided an announcement.

3DG Holdings (International) Limited has issued a profit warning, indicating an expected increase in losses for the six months ending September 30, 2025, with anticipated losses between HK$85 million and HK$95 million. This increase is primarily due to hedging losses resulting from a surge in gold prices, which significantly affected the fair value of the company’s gold loans, particularly in September 2025. The company advises caution to shareholders and potential investors as the financial data is based on unaudited management accounts and may be subject to adjustments.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2882) stock is a Sell with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hong Kong Resources Holdings Co. Ltd. stock, see the HK:2882 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hong Kong Resources Holdings Co. Ltd.

3DG Holdings (International) Limited operates in the precious metals industry, focusing primarily on gold-related financial products and services. The company is involved in activities such as gold trading and hedging, with a market focus on managing the financial risks associated with fluctuations in gold prices.
